profile_backing.source: No ready [perf] bead was available; frankenjax-p1vbf.26 was filed from the post-eig RCH linalg reprofile where qr_1024x1024_f64 was the top fj-lax linalg row.

focused_baseline_before_edit.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-qr-pass26-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

lever.description: Replace iterator-based lane loops in apply_real_householder_columns with explicit while loops over the same 8-column tile, same row traversal, and same per-lane arithmetic.
lever.not_in_scope: No blocked WY/communication-avoiding QR, no tile-width change, no reflector construction change, no dtype/fallback behavior change.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-qr-pass26-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-qr-pass26-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Reflector generation order, reflector application order, Q reverse-pass order, R extraction order, and diagonal sign normalization are unchanged. Each tile still visits row_offset from 0..v.len() and lane from 0..width in ascending order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: QR has no comparison/tie-breaking surface in this path.
isomorphism.floating_point: For every affected element, the expression sequence is unchanged: dot += vi * matrix[row_base + lane], then dot *= tau, then matrix[row_base + lane] -= vi * dot. The while loops replace iterator adapters only; no reassociation, FMA request, pivoting, or reduction reorder was introduced.
isomorphism.rng: No RNG is present in Primitive::Qr.

validation: RCH ts1 cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr_ -- --nocapture: 10 passed
RCH ts1 cargo test -p fj-conformance --test linalg_oracle qr -- --nocapture: 8 passed
RCH ts1 cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets: passed
RCH ts1 cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings: passed
rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs: blocked by pre-existing formatting drift outside this hunk at SVD/LU test lines
ubs crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs: nonzero due existing file-wide panic/unwrap/direct-index inventories; embedded fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks clean
next_primitive: Reprofile after this keep; if QR remains top, the next deep QR primitive is a behavior-contract bead for blocked WY/communication-avoiding QR under JAX tolerance because it changes floating-point association.
